Privacy focused messaging apps

For the better part of a year I have moved from WhatApp to Signal. For thoes in the know Signal is a privacy focused messaging app. But what does that actualy mean ?

Before anyone starts to worry no WhatsApp can’t share any of the messages or media files you have sent with Facebook. The data it can collect is Your phone number, the phone numbers of your contacts, IP addresses that you have connected to, the make and model of your phone, your profile picture, groupes that you are a part of and blocked contacts.

Unfortunaly the nobel intentions at the start of WhatsApps life have all but disolved when Facebook aquierd the company in 2014.

No matter how good a messaging application is, its only as useful as how many people use it and with facebook’s deep pockets

Written on September 1, 2021
